assertions.description: INCORRECT: Same issue as the ZED-X20P panelized board: unrouted_count=30, all entries are 'unconnected-(NC-Pad)' nets with 4 pads each (panel has 4 instances of the board). For example, 'unconnected-(D12-K1-Pad1)' appears with 4 pads ['D12.1', 'D12.1', 'D12.1', 'D12.1']. All 30 unrouted nets are NC pads from J1 USB-C, D12/D13 ESD ICs, and U3 reserved pins. The single-board mosaic-G5 PCB file correctly shows routing_complete=true. Panel dimensions are 115.8 x 100.56 mm, consistent with a 2x2 array of 43.18mm boards with V-score rails.
